turns.speaker: Friend
turns.text: Did you tell them my secret? Just be straight with me.

turns.speaker: Other
turns.text: I mean, who's to say what got said, things spread, you know how it is.

turns.speaker: Friend
turns.text: I trusted you. I need the truth right now.

turns.speaker: Other
turns.text: Okay — yes. I did, and I'm genuinely sorry. I shouldn't have, and I feel awful.
